sentences.sentence: The continuous and reckless use of synthetic chemicals for the control of pests which pose a threat to agricultural crops and human health is proving to be counter-productive.
sentences.translation: 为控制危害农作物和人类健康的害虫而持续、肆意使用合成化学品，事实证明正在产生适得其反的效果。

structure.text: The continuous and reckless use of synthetic chemicals for the control of pests
which pose a threat to agricultural crops and human health

difficult_points: 句子主语中心词是 use，前面的 continuous and reckless 共同修饰这种使用方式。
which 引导定语从句修饰 pests，而不是 chemicals；pose a threat to 表示“对……构成威胁”。
prove to be 在进行时中表示实际结果逐渐显现为“适得其反”。

sentences.sentence: Apart from engendering widespread ecological disorders, pesticides have contributed to the emergence of a new breed of chemical-resistant, highly lethal superbugs.
sentences.translation: 农药除了引发大范围的生态紊乱外，还促成了一类抗化学药剂且致死性极强的新型超级害虫出现。

structure.text: Apart from engendering widespread ecological disorders
the emergence of a new breed of chemical-resistant, highly lethal superbugs

difficult_points: Apart from 后接动名词 engendering，表示“除了造成……之外”。
contribute to 中 to 是介词，后接名词 emergence，表示农药促成了某种结果。
chemical-resistant 与 highly lethal 并列修饰 superbugs。

sentences.sentence: According to a recent study by the Food and Agriculture Organisation (FAO), more than 300 species of agricultural pests have developed resistance to a wide range of potent chemicals.
sentences.translation: 联合国粮食及农业组织（FAO）最近的一项研究显示，已有300多种农业害虫对多种强效化学品产生了抗药性。

structure.text: According to a recent study by the Food and Agriculture Organisation (FAO)
more than 300 species of agricultural pests
resistance to a wide range of potent chemicals

difficult_points: According to... 交代信息来源，不是主句主语。
develop resistance to 是固定搭配，表示逐渐形成对某物的抵抗力。
a wide range of 修饰 potent chemicals，强调涉及的药剂种类很多。

sentences.sentence: Not to be left behind are the disease-spreading pests, about 100 species of which have become immune to a variety of insecticides now in use.
sentences.translation: 传播疾病的害虫也不甘落后，其中约有100种已经对目前使用的多种杀虫剂产生了免疫力。

structure.text: about 100 species of which have become immune to a variety of insecticides now in use

difficult_points: 否定不定式短语置于句首引起主谓倒装，正常语序是 the disease-spreading pests are not to be left behind。
about 100 species of which 是“数量 + of which”结构，which 指 disease-spreading pests。
now in use 是省略关系从句的后置修饰语，修饰 insecticides。

sentences.sentence: One glaring disadvantage of pesticides' application is that, while destroying harmful pests, they also wipe out many useful non-targeted organisms, which keep the growth of the pest population in check.
sentences.translation: 施用农药有一个明显弊端：农药在消灭有害害虫的同时，也会清除许多有益的非目标生物，而这些生物原本能够抑制害虫种群的增长。

structure.text: One glaring disadvantage of pesticides' application
that, while destroying harmful pests, they also wipe out many useful non-targeted organisms
which keep the growth of the pest population in check

difficult_points: that 引导表语从句，说明农药应用的明显弊端是什么。
while destroying... 是省略主语的状语结构，逻辑主语 they 指 pesticides。
which 指 useful non-targeted organisms；keep ... in check 表示将害虫增长控制住。

sentences.sentence: This results in what agroecologists call the 'treadmill syndrome'.
sentences.translation: 这便导致了农业生态学家所谓的“跑步机综合征”。
difficult_points: This 回指农药同时消灭有益生物、破坏种群制衡的现象。
what 引导融合关系从句，既作 call 的宾语，又使整个从句作 results in 的宾语。
call A B 表示“把 A 称为 B”，此处 A 由 what 充当。

sentences.sentence: Because of their tremendous breeding potential and genetic diversity, many pests are known to withstand synthetic chemicals and bear offspring with a built-in resistance to pesticides.
sentences.translation: 由于繁殖潜力巨大且遗传多样性丰富，许多害虫能够抵御合成化学品，并繁育出天生具有农药抗性的后代。

structure.text: Because of their tremendous breeding potential and genetic diversity
to withstand synthetic chemicals and bear offspring with a built-in resistance to pesticides

difficult_points: Because of 后接名词短语说明原因，their 指 many pests。
are known to... 是被动报道结构，表示“已知能够……”。
with a built-in resistance... 后置修饰 offspring；withstand 与 bear 是并列不定式谓语。

sentences.sentence: The havoc that the 'treadmill syndrome' can bring about is well illustrated by what happened to cotton farmers in Central America.
sentences.translation: 中美洲棉农的遭遇充分说明了“跑步机综合征”可能造成的严重破坏。

structure.text: that the 'treadmill syndrome' can bring about
by what happened to cotton farmers in Central America

difficult_points: that 引导定语从句修饰 havoc，并在 bring about 后作宾语。
主句使用被动语态，by 后说明用什么事例来展示这种破坏。
what happened... 是融合关系从句，整体作 by 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: In the early 1940s, basking in the glory of chemical-based intensive agriculture, the farmers avidly took to pesticides as a sure measure to boost crop yield.
sentences.translation: 20世纪40年代初，农民沉浸在化学密集型农业的辉煌之中，热切地开始使用农药，把它视为提高作物产量的可靠手段。

structure.text: basking in the glory of chemical-based intensive agriculture
as a sure measure to boost crop yield

difficult_points: basking... 是伴随状态的现在分词短语，逻辑主语是 the farmers。
take to 在此表示“开始采用并习惯使用”，不是“把……带到”。
as a sure measure 说明农民如何看待农药；to boost... 后置说明 measure 的目的。

sentences.sentence: The insecticide was applied eight times a year in the mid-1940s, rising to 28 in a season in the mid-1950s, following the sudden proliferation of three new varieties of chemical-resistant pests.
sentences.translation: 20世纪40年代中期，杀虫剂每年施用八次；到50年代中期，随着三种新型抗药害虫突然大量繁殖，施用次数增至每季28次。

structure.text: was applied eight times a year
rising to 28 in a season in the mid-1950s
following the sudden proliferation of three new varieties of chemical-resistant pests

difficult_points: rising to... 是现在分词短语，承接 eight times，实际表示施用次数上升。
28 后省略 times，in a season 表示每个种植季。
following 在此是介词，表示施用频率上升发生在新型害虫激增之后。

sentences.sentence: By the mid-1960s, the situation took an alarming turn with the outbreak of four more new pests, necessitating pesticide spraying to such an extent that 50% of the financial outlay on cotton production was accounted for by pesticides.
sentences.translation: 到20世纪60年代中期，随着另外四种新害虫暴发，形势急剧恶化，农药喷洒被迫达到如此程度，以至于棉花生产支出的一半都用于农药。

structure.text: with the outbreak of four more new pests
necessitating pesticide spraying to such an extent
that 50% of the financial outlay on cotton production was accounted for by pesticides

difficult_points: with 引出形势转变时伴随的新害虫暴发。
necessitating... 是现在分词结果状语，逻辑上指前述恶化形势迫使人们加大喷洒。
to such an extent that... 表示“达到如此程度以至于”；was accounted for by 在此表示农药占据支出的比例。

sentences.sentence: In the early 1970s, the spraying frequently reached 70 times a season as the farmers were pushed to the wall by the invasion of genetically stronger insect species.
sentences.translation: 20世纪70年代初，由于遗传上更强的昆虫种类入侵，农民被逼入绝境，农药喷洒频率常常达到每季70次。

structure.text: as the farmers were pushed to the wall by the invasion of genetically stronger insect species

difficult_points: as 引导原因从句，解释喷洒频率为何进一步提高。
were pushed to the wall 是被动形式的习语，表示农民被逼得走投无路。
by the invasion... 说明施压来源，genetically stronger 修饰 insect species。

sentences.sentence: Most of the pesticides in the market today remain inadequately tested for properties that cause cancer and mutations as well as for other adverse effects on health, says a study by United States environmental agencies.
sentences.translation: 美国环境机构的一项研究指出，如今市面上的大多数农药，对于其致癌、致突变性质以及其他健康危害，仍未得到充分检测。

structure.text: Most of the pesticides in the market today
for properties that cause cancer and mutations as well as for other adverse effects on health
says a study by United States environmental agencies

difficult_points: 主干是 Most... remain inadequately tested，句末 says a study... 是倒装的报道语。
that 引导定语从句修饰 properties，说明这些性质会导致癌症和突变。
for ... as well as for... 并列两类尚未充分检测的健康风险。

sentences.sentence: The United States National Resource Defense Council has found that DDT was the most popular of a long list of dangerous chemicals in use.
sentences.translation: 美国自然资源保护委员会发现，在一长串正在使用的危险化学品中，DDT 曾是使用最广泛的一种。

structure.text: The United States National Resource Defense Council
that DDT was the most popular of a long list of dangerous chemicals in use

difficult_points: that 引导 found 的宾语从句，说明委员会的发现。
the most popular of... 表示在所列危险化学品中使用最普遍。
in use 后置修饰 chemicals，表示这些化学品当时正在投入使用。

sentences.sentence: In the face of the escalating perils from indiscriminate applications of pesticides, a more effective and ecologically sound strategy of biological control, involving the selective use of natural enemies of the pest population, is fast gaining popularity—though, as yet, it is a new field with limited potential.
sentences.translation: 面对不加选择地施用农药所带来的日益严重的危害，一种更有效、更符合生态原则的生物防治策略正迅速普及；这种策略有选择地利用害虫的天敌，不过目前它仍是一个潜力有限的新领域。

structure.text: In the face of the escalating perils from indiscriminate applications of pesticides
a more effective and ecologically sound strategy of biological control
involving the selective use of natural enemies of the pest population
though, as yet, it is a new field with limited potential

difficult_points: 句子主语中心词是 strategy，involving... 是插入的现在分词短语，说明策略的具体做法。
In the face of... 表示应对背景；from indiscriminate applications 修饰 perils 的来源。
破折号后的 though 引导让步从句，as yet 表示“迄今、目前为止”。

sentences.sentence: The advantage of biological control in contrast to other methods is that it provides a relatively low-cost, perpetual control system with a minimum of detrimental side-effects.
sentences.translation: 与其他方法相比，生物防治的优势在于，它能以相对较低的成本建立一种持续有效、且不良副作用极少的控制体系。

structure.text: The advantage of biological control in contrast to other methods
that it provides a relatively low-cost, perpetual control system with a minimum of detrimental side-effects

difficult_points: in contrast to other methods 插在主语内部，限定生物防治优势的比较对象。
that 引导表语从句；it 指 biological control。
with a minimum of... 修饰 control system，说明副作用被降至最低。

sentences.sentence: When handled by experts, bio-control is safe, non-polluting and self-dispersing.
sentences.translation: 由专家妥善实施时，生物防治既安全、无污染，又能自行扩散。
difficult_points: When handled... 是省略主语和 be 动词的被动状语从句，可还原为 when bio-control is handled...。
safe、non-polluting 与 self-dispersing 是三个并列表语。

sentences.sentence: The Commonwealth Institute of Biological Control (CIBC) in Bangalore, with its global network of research laboratories and field stations, is one of the most active, non-commercial research agencies engaged in pest control by setting natural predators against parasites.
sentences.translation: 位于班加罗尔的英联邦生物防治研究所（CIBC）拥有遍布全球的研究实验室和野外站点网络，是最活跃的非商业性研究机构之一，通过利用害虫的天敌来开展害虫防治。

structure.text: The Commonwealth Institute of Biological Control (CIBC) in Bangalore
with its global network of research laboratories and field stations
one of the most active, non-commercial research agencies
engaged in pest control by setting natural predators against parasites

difficult_points: with... 是插入成分，补充 CIBC 拥有的全球研究网络。
engaged in... 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 research agencies。
by setting A against B 表示利用 A 对付 B，是实施害虫防治的方式。

sentences.sentence: CIBC also serves as a clearing-house for the export and import of biological agents for pest control world-wide.
sentences.translation: CIBC 还充当全球害虫防治生物制剂进出口的信息与协调中心。

structure.text: a clearing-house for the export and import of biological agents for pest control world-wide

difficult_points: serve as 表示“充当、发挥……作用”。
clearing-house 在此不是普通的票据交换所，而是汇集并协调信息与资源的中心。
for pest control world-wide 说明这些 biological agents 的用途及范围。

sentences.sentence: CIBC successfully used a seed-feeding weevil, native to Mexico, to control the obnoxious parthenium weed, known to exert devious influence on agriculture and human health in both India and Australia.
sentences.translation: CIBC 成功利用一种原产于墨西哥、以种子为食的象鼻虫，控制令人厌恶的银胶菊；这种杂草在印度和澳大利亚都被认为会对农业和人类健康造成隐蔽而有害的影响。

structure.text: to control the obnoxious parthenium weed
known to exert devious influence on agriculture and human health in both India and Australia

difficult_points: native to Mexico 插入修饰 weevil，说明象鼻虫的原产地。
to control... 表示使用这种象鼻虫的目的。
known to exert... 紧跟 parthenium weed，修饰的是杂草而非象鼻虫；in both... 说明影响发生的地区。

expressions.text: be known to exert influence on

sentences.sentence: Similarly the Hyderabad-based Regional Research Laboratory (RRL), supported by CIBC, is now trying out an Argentinian weevil for the eradication of water hyacinth, another dangerous weed, which has become a nuisance in many parts of the world.
sentences.translation: 同样，得到 CIBC 支持、总部位于海得拉巴的区域研究实验室（RRL），正在试用一种阿根廷象鼻虫来根除水葫芦；水葫芦是另一种危险杂草，已在世界许多地区成为公害。

structure.text: for the eradication of water hyacinth
which has become a nuisance in many parts of the world

difficult_points: supported by CIBC 是过去分词插入语，修饰 RRL。
another dangerous weed 是 water hyacinth 的同位语；which 从句继续补充这种杂草造成的问题。
try out 表示试用、试验；for the eradication of 说明试用象鼻虫的目的。

sentences.sentence: According to Mrs Kaiser Jamil of RRL, 'The Argentinian weevil does not attack any other plant and a pair of adult bugs could destroy the weed in 4-5 days.'
sentences.translation: 据 RRL 的 Kaiser Jamil 女士介绍：“这种阿根廷象鼻虫不会侵害其他任何植物，一对成年象鼻虫能在4至5天内消灭这种杂草。”

structure.text: According to Mrs Kaiser Jamil of RRL
does not attack any other plant
and a pair of adult bugs could destroy the weed in 4-5 days

difficult_points: According to... 交代引语来源，后面的引号内容才是陈述主体。
and 连接两个完整分句：不会伤害其他植物，以及能够快速消灭目标杂草。
a pair of adult bugs 是单数组合名词，could 表示能力或预期效果。

sentences.sentence: CIBC is also perfecting the technique for breeding parasites that prey on 'disapene scale' insects— notorious defoliants of fruit trees in the US and India.
sentences.translation: CIBC 还在完善一种培育寄生生物的技术，这些寄生生物以“disapene scale”介壳虫为食；这种昆虫是美国和印度果树上臭名昭著的食叶害虫。

structure.text: notorious defoliants of fruit trees in the US and India

difficult_points: for breeding parasites 修饰 technique，说明这项技术的用途。
that 引导定语从句修饰 parasites，而不是 technique；prey on 表示捕食。
破折号后的 notorious defoliants 是 'disapene scale' insects 的同位说明。

sentences.sentence: How effectively biological control can be pressed into service is proved by the following examples.
sentences.translation: 下面的实例证明了生物防治能够得到多么有效的运用。

structure.text: How effectively biological control can be pressed into service

difficult_points: How effectively 引导感叹含义的名词性从句，整个从句作句子主语。
can be pressed into service 是被动语态，表示生物防治被投入实际应用。
主句 is proved by... 说明后面的案例是证明依据。

sentences.sentence: In the late 1960s, when Sri Lanka's flourishing coconut groves were plagued by leaf-mining hispides, a larval parasite imported from Singapore brought the pest under control.
sentences.translation: 20世纪60年代末，斯里兰卡繁茂的椰林遭到潜叶甲虫侵害时，一种从新加坡引进的幼虫寄生生物控制住了这种害虫。

structure.text: when Sri Lanka's flourishing coconut groves were plagued by leaf-mining hispides

difficult_points: when 从句用 were plagued by 的被动语态，交代椰林遭虫害的背景。
imported from Singapore 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 a larval parasite。
bring ... under control 表示将某种威胁控制住。

sentences.sentence: A natural predator indigenous to India, Neodumetia sangawani, was found useful in controlling the Rhodes grass-scale insect that was devouring forage grass in many parts of the US.
sentences.translation: 一种原产于印度的天敌 Neodumetia sangawani，被发现能有效控制在美国许多地区啃食牧草的罗得斯草介壳虫。

structure.text: A natural predator indigenous to India
in controlling the Rhodes grass-scale insect
that was devouring forage grass in many parts of the US

difficult_points: indigenous to India 后置修饰 predator，Neodumetia sangawani 是其同位名称。
was found useful 是“find + 宾语 + useful”的被动形式；in controlling 说明有效的方面。
that 从句修饰 insect，was devouring 强调害虫当时持续吞食牧草。

sentences.sentence: By using Neochetina bruchi, a beetle native to Brazil, scientists at Kerala Agricultural University freed a 12-kilometre-long canal from the clutches of the weed Salvinia molesta, popularly called 'African Payal' in Kerala.
sentences.translation: 喀拉拉农业大学的科学家利用原产于巴西的甲虫 Neochetina bruchi，使一条长12公里的运河摆脱了槐叶萍的侵扰；这种杂草在喀拉拉邦俗称“African Payal”。

structure.text: from the clutches of the weed Salvinia molesta

difficult_points: a beetle native to Brazil 是 Neochetina bruchi 的同位语，补充其类别和原产地。
free A from B 表示使 A 摆脱 B；from the clutches of 是形象化表达。
popularly called... 是过去分词短语，修饰 Salvinia molesta，而非 canal。

sentences.sentence: About 30,000 hectares of rice fields in Kerala are infested by this weed.
sentences.translation: 喀拉拉邦约有3万公顷稻田受到这种杂草侵害。

structure.text: About 30,000 hectares of rice fields in Kerala

difficult_points: 主语中心是表示面积的 About 30,000 hectares，of rice fields 说明所计量的对象。
are infested by 是被动结构，强调稻田大面积遭杂草侵占；this weed 回指 Salvinia molesta。
